title: antiaris toxicaria subsp. toxicaria
intro: Antiaris toxicaria subsp. toxicaria, also known as the Sterculiaceae family's Antiaris toxicaria subsp. toxicaria, is a plant species commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of extracts, decoctions, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
